hypothesis: If LLMs are augmented with explicit external tools for planning and memory and coupled in a closed loop with DiffCSP structure generation and iComFormer property evaluation (MatAgent), then they will achieve a higher success rate (compositions within ±0.25 eV/atom of target formation energies) and improved compositional validity, uniqueness, and novelty compared to tool-free LLM variants and MatterGen because tool-guided reasoning and iterative feedback produce more informed and effective composition proposals.
